meaning: 赫布里底群岛[英国苏格兰西部](被小明奇海峡分为内赫布里底群岛
examples: The Hebrides are to the west of the Scottish mainland.
The passengers, they did what you'd call I their deplaning in the New Hebrides Islands.
The island is normally protected from extreme weather conditions by its sheltered location in the Inner Hebrides.
This volcanic archipelago, with its spectacular landscapes, is situated off the coast of the Hebrides.
The Emergency Medical Retrieval Service (EMRS) originally operated in the Hebrides and down the west coast.
